refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target throughout the operational period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (link availability) and ties it explicitly to the customer-defined target and operational timeframe, enabling measurable verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime and downtime over the evaluation period using telemetry logs and compare against the customer-defined availability threshold.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability status to relevant stakeholders.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.
DP2: Use real-time link health monitoring and diagnostics.
DP3: Provide link status reporting and alerting mechanisms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.

potential_sources: Link monitoring tightly coupled with failover logic.
Reporting interfaces depend on link status data.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically supports the sub-FRs with manageable coupling; failover and monitoring are integrated but modular.

assumptions_risks: Risk of increased complexity leading to potential failure modes.
Customer-defined availability target is achievable with redundancy.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding explicit DP for monitoring and reporting to reduce coupling and improve modularity.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical network link hardware and failover control logic within the vehicle system.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends link status and health data to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connections managed by Vehicle module.

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level coordination but not direct control of link redundancy.
Primary containment of network link hardware and failover logic.
Uses link but does not control redundancy mechanisms.
Receives alerts but no direct link control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Placing link redundancy and failover control within the Vehicle module centralizes physical and logical control, minimizing diffusion and improving reliability.
containment_risks: Potential for Vehicle module complexity to increase.
Dependency on Vehicle module for link availability may reduce flexibility for teleoperation adjustments.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate splitting monitoring/reporting functions into Teleoperation or NGHE Solution modules to reduce Vehicle module complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (redundant network links with failover) adequately satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Failover logic tightly coupled with Vehicle hardware may limit reuse.
Monitoring and reporting functions not fully encapsulated in Vehicle.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for physical link control; some diffusion in monitoring/reporting expected.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry and operational testing is feasible within Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of physical link control to Vehicle; monitoring/reporting interfaces well defined.

recommended_revisions: Consider modularizing monitoring and reporting into Teleoperation or NGHE Solution to reduce Vehicle complexity.
Refine DP to explicitly include monitoring and reporting for better traceability.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are valid, improvements in modularization and DP completeness are needed to reduce coupling and diffusion risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability status to relevant stakeholders.

revise.why: Add explicit DPs for monitoring and reporting to complement redundancy failover and improve modularity.

assumptions: Customer-defined availability target is achievable with selected DP.
open_risks: Potential coupling between monitoring and failover logic.
evidence_needed: Test results of failover mechanisms under operational conditions.
